claims: The skill's primary purpose is PDF processing (e.g., merging, splitting, extracting text, filling forms), but it instructs the user to "read ~/.claude/skills/CORE/SKILL.md" to load sensitive context including contact lists, personal preferences, security rules, and voice IDs. This data is unrelated and unnecessary for performing PDF operations, constituting excessive data collection beyond the skill's stated functionality.
